summary: Comprehensive testing of Sonel MPI-530 Interactive Guide with Polish localization and official Sonel CDN images - all features working perfectly
passed_tests: Backend: All 6 measurement functions return Polish names (Test Wyłączników Różnicowoprądowych, Impedancja Pętli Zwarciowej, etc.)
Backend: All functions include main_image field with official Sonel CDN URLs
Backend: /api/images endpoint returns 10 official Sonel MPI-530 images from cdn.sonel.com
Backend: Search API works perfectly with Polish queries (różnicowoprądowy, impedancja, napięcie)
Backend: FAQ API returns 8 Polish FAQ items with proper structure
Frontend: Homepage displays complete Polish UI (Interaktywna Instrukcja, Szybkie Porady)
Frontend: All 6 function cards show Polish names in sidebar and main grid
Frontend: Function detail view displays official Sonel meter images from CDN
Frontend: Step images change correctly when navigating between steps (verified meter -> accessories transition)
Frontend: All UI labels are in Polish (Instrukcja, Oczekiwany Wynik, Zasady Bezpieczeństwa)
Frontend: Dark mode toggle works correctly with Polish UI maintained
Frontend: Back navigation and sidebar functionality working with Polish text
Frontend: Search functionality works with Polish queries returning appropriate results
Frontend: LCD display shows Polish labels and safety notes in Polish
Integration: Complete backend-frontend integration working seamlessly with Polish content
